data.title: Sonic & Friends
data.synopsis:
A short anime featuring the cute Sonic characters.

Aimed at children, the series is composed of short animations about the cute "chibi" versions of Sonic the Hedgehog, his friends Tails, Knuckles and Amy, and the evil Dr. Eggman.

(Source: Sonic Wiki)
data.background: It is a Japanese CGI-animated web series developed by SEGA, based on the Sonic the Hedgehog series. It is a series of shorts uploaded to the social media platform TikTok, on the official SEGA account. (Source: Sonic Wiki)

data.title: Gendai Goyaku
data.synopsis:
The series focuses on teaching students famous quotations from historical figures from all over the world by presenting the quotations incorrectly at first as "mistranslations" in the "modern day," encouraging the students to learn the correct quotes in the process.

(Source: Crunchyroll)

titles.title: この恋で鼻血を止めて
Kono Koi de Hanaji wo Tomete

data.title: Wuliao Jiu Wanjie
title_synonyms: この恋で鼻血を止めて
Kono Koi de Hanaji wo Tomete
data.synopsis:
Men Ke, a typical office worker, spent the first half of her life so bored she questioned its meaning, only to face the prospect of dying from boredom in the second half. How will this Earthly heroine, facing the daily threat of death yet still forced to go to work, and the enthusiastic but ultimately ineffective alien hero who wants to save her, overcome boredom and live a happy life?

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
data.background: Adaptation of Chengzi's (澄子) Chinese webtoon, Wuliao Jiu Hui Si (无聊就会死).

data.title: Bubble Beam Berry Blast
data.synopsis:

(Source: YouTube)

data.title: Crong Crong Ujudaesodong
data.synopsis:
All of the sudden, aliens who look exactly like Crong appeared in Porong Porong Village! Crong followed those aliens who look and act just like him into the space. Pororo and Eddie decided to go to space to find Crong. Where did the aliens, who looked like Crong come from? Will Crong can return to Porong Porong village?

(Source: Amazon Prime)

data.title: Chan
data.synopsis:
Mom always braided my hair so tautly that it carved a distinct path atop my head. But one day, she cut off the carefully braided hair. As I took my first steps forward alone, my stride faltered. Along the path on my head, I touched our unbreakable inner attachment, and the journey of female growth we were both unprepared to face.

(Source: Official Site)
data.background: Runner-up for Best Animated Short Film at the 60th Golden Horse Awards.

data.title: Ibiza
data.synopsis: Music video for the song Ibiza by Crush.

data.title: Spy x Family Season 3
data.synopsis:
Despite occasional setbacks, Operation Strix has remained on track to extract sensitive information from the enigmatic politician Donovan Desmond. To this end, spy Loid Forger has managed to maintain his pretend family consisting of his telepathic daughter, Anya; assassin wife, Yor; and their clairvoyant dog, Bond. Still the only one aware of everyone's true identities, Anya tries to sustain the family's cohesion while working to befriend Donovan's son Damian, her Eden Academy classmate.

However, Anya's efforts instead earn her another Tonitrus Bolt, bringing her closer to getting expelled and jeopardizing the operation's success. Hearing the news, Loid faints from shock. In his unconsciousness, he reminisces about his tragic past and his journey to becoming a spy. Realizing what Operation Strix means to him and the world, Loid finds renewed motivation. Although they each work toward their own covert goals, the Forgers continue to cherish their chaotic yet blissful family life.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Pororo Movie: Badas-sog Daemoheom
data.synopsis:
Pororo and his friends visit the stronghold of the Red Hunters, the guardians of the ocean, filled with admiration in their hearts. They face consecutive attacks from sea garbage, nasty sharks, and the terrifying sea monster Situs. Though Pororo and Crong are rescued by Merlok, their attempt to hunt Situs fails, and the creature escapes with their friends swallowed. Refusing to give up on their friends, Pororo and Crong decide to help Merlok capture Situs. However, Merlok’s revealed plan to sacrifice their friends shocks Pororo deeply. Can Pororo and Crong stop Merlok and save their friends?

(Source: K-Movie Entertainment)

titles.title: Cong Gu Huo Niao Kaishi: Long Cheng Fengyun
Starting from Guhuo Bird: Dragon City Storm
从姑获鸟开始之龙城风云

data.title: Cong Gu Huo Niao Kaishi: Long Cheng Fengyun
data.title_japanese: 从姑获鸟开始之龙城风云
title_synonyms: Starting from Guhuo Bird: Dragon City Storm
data.synopsis:
Li Yan, a martial artist with extraordinary talent, has only a few months left to live due to a terminal illness. When he was in a desperate situation, he accidentally met a man who called himself "Tapir" and was sent into a fruit of the "Yanfu Fruit Tree". Li Yan must complete three tasks issued by the system within the time limit, and earn money through boxing matches in exchange for Yanfu points to buy medicine that can cure terminal illnesses. 

As he gets to know Longyuan Fortress where he is located, Li Yan is gradually involved in the disputes in the fortress, and he also realizes that there are other Yanfu Walkers competing with him in secret. After overcoming many difficulties, Li Yan finally successfully completed the task and gained a new life.

(Source: bilibili, translated)

data.title: Pororo Loopy Moheom
data.synopsis:
Oh, no!! Pororo's friends are taken by the Giant!! However, Pororo and Loopy continue fighting because they are so different! Can Pororo and Loopy finish their adventure and successfully save their friends?

(Source: Amazon Prime)

data.synopsis: Music video for the song Ramen Chikyuu-gou by Kohmi Hirose that was featured on NHK's Minna no Uta program.

data.title: Baby
data.synopsis:
Unalloyed living beings, neither male nor female, are not ashamed of and do not hide themselves from anything. Each individual member of the group is having a meal, dancing and swimming together. They all dream of Utopia in which they can love each other and have a positive attitude toward the world without being tied down by rules and a grade of rank.

(Source: Vimeo)
